name: TV
description:
Client is a diabetic patient who also experiences ongoing gastrointestinal issues. She suffers from frequent diarrhoea and urinary urgency, which has resulted in her needing to use diapers daily. The client often feels physically weak, making it difficult for her to secure stable employment.
She is known to SSO and currently receives financial assistance. While she has adequate informal support, the client prefers not to trouble her support network and will only seek help when she has insufficient funds. She stays alone in a rental flat.

name: Washing machine
description: This family of four has recently moved into their rental flat after spending two years in transitional shelter, marking a significant and hopeful milestone toward stability and independence. As they rebuild their lives, they are starting from scratch and lack essential household items needed to make their new space functional and dignified. The mother, who is the sole breadwinner, earns just over $2,000 a month and works hard to provide for her family, but her income is largely committed to daily living expenses, utilities, school needs, and basic necessities. A washing machine would greatly ease the family’s financial and physical burden by reducing the need to go to a laundromat. Your support in donating a washing machine would not only meet a practical need but also help provide the family with greater stability, comfort, and dignity as they settle into their new home.

contact.org: AWWA Ltd - Transitional Shelter (JT)
